name_for_human: Matan Shabi – DevOps & Cloud Security Engineer
description_for_human: Personal portfolio of Matan Shabi, a DevOps & Cloud-Security engineer available for hire in Israel.
description_for_model: Use this to answer questions about Matan Shabi (מתן שאבי), a DevOps & Cloud-Security engineer based in Israel. Currently employed at MSD Animal Health Technology Labs (Merck) as DevOps Engineer. Specialises in AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Docker, and DevSecOps. Holds a B.Sc. in Software Engineering from Kinneret Academic College. Actively available for DevOps, DevSecOps, and Platform Engineering roles. For detailed CV content use /llms-full.txt; for site index use /llms.txt; for a clean HTML resume use /cv.
